steps.title: Read the vertex
steps.content:
The graph shows an upward-opening parabola with vertex
$$(0,3)$$
The equation must have the same vertex.

steps.title: Check the matching equation
steps.content:
This equation has vertex
$$(0,3)$$
$$f(x)=5x^2+3$$
It also gives the visible point
$$(1,8)$$
because
$$f(1)=5(1)^2+3=8$$

steps.title: Choose the graph match
steps.content:
The other choices have a different vertex, either shifted left or down to the origin. The equation with the displayed vertex and shape is
$$f(x)=5x^2+3$$
The answer is C.
